name: Bambietta Basterbine, Candice Catnipp, Meninas McAllon, Liltotto Lamperd and Giselle Gewelle (YAMAthegod)
description:
Get ready to take charge of supervising these four girls and one boy who only want to cause trouble.

This bot was a real challenge for me. It was very difficult to set up, and I had to try several times to get the image censorship right. The initial message was also a huge problem, so I really hope you like it. If you have any issues, like the bot speaking for you, just refresh the message, as it sometimes happens despite my attempts to fix it.

I censored the image in this way so that the janitor would let me upload the bo, but if you want the uncensored image, just go to the link below.

Image link: YAMAthegod
creator: Nileskan
